MINI MINUTES:

RE: ASSIGNEE RIVER HEIGHTS CAPITAL, LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The claim of exemption is denied. Debtor fails to cite a recognized exemption.
